beschreibung: A top-down bird's-eye vector illustration of a rain-soaked German municipal waterworks compound at night, with a small office building at center casting a phosphor-green glow onto wet asphalt, framed by water tanks, power lines, and neighboring rooftops.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a lone IT admin silhouetted from behind at a console in a German municipal water-tower control room, facing a wall of phosphor-green glowing terminals on a rainy night, with giant industrial pipes rising into darkness above.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a tense late-night audit meeting in a German municipal utility office conference room, with an auditor at the head of a binder-stacked table, two IT staff hunched in shadow, and a diagonal projector beam cutting through the room.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a tense late-night moment inside a German municipal utility office server room, with a tall black server rack glowing sickly phosphor-green, abandoned tools on the polished concrete floor, and pale warm light spilling through an open doorway.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a German municipal utility office worker at a late-night desk, frozen with hand hovering over the mouse as a suspicious email glows phosphor-green on the monitor, rendered in flat shapes with hard-edged shadows and a near-monochrome palette accented by green screen glow and warm amber corridor light.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a German municipal utility control room at night, with a silhouetted operator rising from the central console as a wall of twelve monitors goes dark one by one, lit by a single red emergency lamp and phosphor-green screen glow.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of an abandoned German municipal utility office at the end of a long day, with a single green LED blinking on a server rack in the dark, rendered in flat shapes with hard-edged shadows and a near-monochrome palette accented by phosphor-green and pale warm light.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a middle-aged German municipal utility administrator locking up at the end of the night, framed by an open steel door against a shadowed corridor, with phosphor-green monitor glow and warm sodium light through venetian blinds as the only accents.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a middle-aged German municipal utility clerk slouched in his office chair at sunrise, lit by warm horizontal blinds-bars and the phosphor-green glow of dual monitors, with an empty neighboring desk cropping in from the lower-left.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a lone figure in an overcoat and flat cap standing dead center between two lit doorways in a German municipal utility office corridor, warm amber light spilling from the left and cold phosphor-green from the right, with a rainy window at the vanishing point.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a tense midnight exchange in a concrete stairwell, two hooded figures passing a USB stick under the cold green glow of an emergency exit sign, rendered in flat shapes with hard-edged shadows and a near-monochrome palette.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a tense late-night moment inside a German municipal utility office, where a clerk's half-cropped face at the right edge reacts in shock to a CRT terminal glowing phosphor-green on the cluttered desk, with rain-streaked venetian blinds and a dim corridor doorway behind.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a tense late-night moment inside a German municipal utility office, where a single pale hand holds a handwritten note up to the cold phosphor-green glow of a CRT monitor, with looming black shelves behind and warm corridor light spilling through an open doorway.

A flat vector noir editorial illustration of a late-night German municipal utility office desk, with an abandoned employee badge and password sticky note resting on a mechanical keyboard in a pool of phosphor-green monitor light, framed by a rain-streaked window and a warm-lit doorway.

A flat vector illustration of a slick German municipal utility vendor office lobby on a rainy evening, with a lone figure in a dark coat standing near a reception desk facing a glowing green demo screen, an oversized abstract logo sculpture above, and a rain-streaked glass wall along the right.

A flat vector noir illustration of a colocation datacenter aisle at night, with rows of black server racks converging toward an open doorway spilling warm amber light, a lone technician silhouette mid-aisle lit by his tablet's green glow, rendered in deep blacks and slate grey with phosphor-green accents.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a tense late-afternoon moment inside a German municipal utility office helpdesk, with an older clerk behind a diagonal counter and a lone customer waiting, rendered in flat shapes with hard-edged shadows and a single phosphor-green accent.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of an abandoned late-night municipal meeting room in a German utility office, with a long conference table cutting a strong diagonal toward a lit doorway, the projector still running, and phosphor-green monitor glow as the only accent.

A flat vector illustration of a small-town German municipal IT office after hours on a rainy evening, three grey desks with phosphor-green monitors in a row, a dying plant, coffee mugs, and warm corridor light spilling from the right, rendered deadpan with cinematic tension.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a cramped German municipal utility server room in the 2020s, with two aging server racks glowing phosphor-green, a dripping wall AC unit, a KRITIS warning door, and slatted warm light cutting through rain-streaked blinds on the right.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a tired German municipal utility office at late evening, where a solutions engineer leans against his desk lit by phosphor-green monitor glow while an older colleague works nearby, with rain-streaked blinds and a warm-lit doorway in the deep background.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a tense late-afternoon sales pitch inside a cramped German municipal utility office, with a Cloud365 rep leaning eagerly across a cluttered desk toward a stiff bureaucrat, lit by phosphor-green laptop glow and hard amber blind-slatted bars.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a Telekom field technician pausing in a German municipal utility office corridor in late afternoon, framed by an open doorway spilling warm light on the left and a rain-streaked window on the right, with phosphor-green accents from a monitor and LED panel.

A flat vector noir illustration of a man in his forties seated at a cluttered desk inside a German municipal utility office cubicle, lit by phosphor-green monitor glow and pale warm blind-light bars on a rainy afternoon.

A noir editorial vector illustration of a vanished municipal employee's aged staff-ID photo pinned to a cork case board, the portrait rendered in flat shapes with hard-edged shadows, a phosphor-green screen glow raking the upper-left and warm doorway light spilling from the lower-right.

A flat vector noir illustration of a German municipal utility office on a rainy afternoon, with an external service tech mid-stride through the doorway while a seated worker hunches over a phosphor-green monitor and a second worker recedes behind a glass partition.

A flat vector noir illustration of three men in a German municipal utility office breakroom on a rainy morning, the older man laughing hard while two quieter colleagues flank him beside a coffee machine, rendered in near-monochrome charcoal with a single phosphor-green LED accent.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a tense late-afternoon moment inside a German municipal utility office, where a woman in her mid-40s grimaces at a jammed printer as a deadline looms, rendered in flat shapes with hard-edged shadows and a near-monochrome palette accented by phosphor-green monitor glow and pale warm window light.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a gaunt German municipal treasurer clutching a budget folder like a shield in his rain-streaked office, lit by cold phosphor-green monitor glow and warm corridor light bleeding through an open doorway.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a gaunt German municipal treasurer clutching a budget folder like a shield inside a rain-streaked utility office, his face split between phosphor-green monitor glow and warm amber light from venetian blinds.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of a German municipal utility office in late afternoon, with a businesswoman in a charcoal blazer standing beside a smoked-glass wall, phosphor-green monitor glow on the left and hard warm light bands from a rain-streaked window on the right.

A flat vector editorial illustration of a German businesswoman in a charcoal blazer standing in a municipal utility office on a rainy late afternoon, framed off-center against a smoked-glass partition with phosphor-green monitor glow and hard cream light bands from half-drawn blinds.

A dark noir editorial vector illustration of Bert, a mid-50s German waterworks operations head, working alone at his desk late at night under phosphor-green monitor glow, with a warm-lit doorway and rainy window framing the scene.
